description: A delicate pen-and-wash drawing depicting a shoreline scene in the suburbs of Saint Petersburg. In the foreground, two figures stand on a sandy bank — an adult carrying a basket and walking with a stick, and a smaller figure crouching nearby. To the left, a figure works near a small boat at the water's edge. In the middle distance, flat marshland stretches toward the horizon. At the right, two sailing vessels with tall masts ride at anchor. The sky is rendered in pale, empty washes, conveying the vast, overcast atmosphere of the northern waterfront.

_meta.title: In the Suburbs of St. Petersburg
